LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO.'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE." PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL STATES THAT THERE WAS "A MEET AND CONFER VIA EMAIL," AND DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S DECLARATION IS NOT TO THE CONTRARY. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY. AMERICAN CONTRACTORS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 9, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Continued To Oct-27-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to October 5, 2021. By no later than September 25, 2021 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief limited to citation to cases, with no further argument, factually similar to the case at bar brought by a similarly situated plaintiff under (1) B&P 7071.5(a) and (2) B&P 7071.5(c); e.g. cases in which a neighbor was found a third-party beneficiary; cases in which willful and deliberate violation was alleged, etc. If Plaintiff is unable to locate such cases, Plaintiff shall state "none."

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Demurrer filed on June 21, 2021 is not supported by motion or points and authorities. Prior demurrer was taken off calendar on June 15, 2021 and no order of the Court was obtained to allow the use of previously filed briefs in support of and in opposition to the demurrer in conjunction with the Court ordered response. No courtesy copies of any filings were provided to the Court, so even if the Court were to overlook parties' decision to disregard judge Ulmer's order to file a response by July 9, 2021 after engaging in meet and confer efforts, it is not clear what briefs the parties indented to be considered by the Court. June 21, 2021 Notice of Demurrer and Declaration of counsel do not specifically provide such information (title of the filing to be considered, date of the filing, etc). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Continued To Jul-29-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard on department 501 on July 29, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department hears all damage to real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant American Contractors Indemnity Co.'s demurrer to the complaint is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone." Plaintiff's counsel states that there was "a meet and confer via email," and defendant counsel's declaration is not to the contrary. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. American Contractors' response to the complaint is now due by July 9, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
